name: strideos
description: Open-source, user-owned endurance coaching skills for Codex and ChatGPT.

interface.longDescription: StrideOS helps an athlete onboard, interpret training evidence, build and adapt an endurance plan, use optional fueling support, prepare coaching rhythms, and create a Training Circle. It recommends official data routes without restricting user-selected scripts, plugins, browser tools, computer use, or other host capabilities.
defaultPrompt: Build my athlete map and recommend a safe starting week.
Review my recent training, propose next week, and prepare my coaching schedule.
Create a Training Circle I control.
